global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, elongated body and a distinctive long, boat-shaped tail. Its plumage is predominantly glossy black with iridescent blue and purple hues. The bird has a sharp, pointed beak and long legs.
discriminative_attributes: Glossy black plumage with iridescent blue and purple

part_details.plumage: Glossy black with iridescent blue and purple sheen, smooth texture.
part_details.tail: Long, boat-shaped, tapering to a point, glossy black.

spatial_relations: The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
The sharp beak is positioned at the front of the head.
The long legs are positioned beneath the body, supporting it.
